summary: Iteration 7 testing complete: validated burst-spawn backend fix, Pokemon GO map style, TrainerAvatar SVG, zoom controls, and gestureHandling='greedy'. All targeted features work; 4/4 backend tests pass; UI verified visually with screenshot showing chibi trainer avatar, vivid green map, white roads, and >=4 spawn markers.

issues: Visual contrast OK; circular FABs sit cleanly above locate-me-btn (zoom-in y=612, locate y=724).

verified_features: GET /api/spawn/current (after flee) returns >=4 spawns immediately on first poll (BURST works).
Rarity mix across burst: at least 2 distinct rarities observed.
Re-poll within seconds: same spawn_ids preserved (no churn) and capped at 5.
Frontend: data-testid='my-location-avatar' renders SVG with 4 radialGradients and 26 shapes (paths/circles/ellipses/rects) — full chibi character body+cap (NOT the old blue dot).
data-testid='zoom-in-btn' and 'zoom-out-btn' exist as circular FABs above locate-me-btn; both clickable without errors.
gestureHandling='greedy' confirmed: mouse drag on map moved the spawn-marker by 257px (map dragged successfully without modifier keys).
After mocking geolocation to camp center (40.6396,-73.6665), 4–5 spawn-marker elements render on map.
Catch flow regression: POST /api/spawn/catch returns 200, deducts ball, response includes success/message; ball balance changes after throw.
critical_code_review_comments: MapPage.jsx: minor — onZoomChanged keeps zoom React state in sync with mapRef, but the inline zoom-in/out callbacks also setZoom(z) immediately. Slight redundancy but harmless.
TrainerAvatar.jsx: walking prop is plumbed but always passed false from MapPage; could be wired to recent geolocation movement to add a walking animation in the future.
test_credentials: Camper login uses GET /api/groups → /campers → POST /api/camper/login (no password). Admin: admin / Camp1993 (not exercised this iteration).
seed_data_creation: None — used existing campers from groups roster (group B01, camper Colton Ahern).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 verified the Pokemon GO look + burst spawning. Tests live in test_iteration7_burst_spawn.py — re-run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL set. Frontend smoke test pattern: mock geolocation via add_init_script with Object.defineProperty navigator.geolocation BEFORE goto, then login a camper via fetch and stuff token into localStorage as 'rrdc_user_token', set 'rrdc_onboarded_<camperId>'='1' to bypass OnboardingModal. data-testid: my-location-avatar, trainer-avatar, zoom-in-btn, zoom-out-btn, locate-me-btn, spawn-marker, hud-status, open-catch-btn.
rca of the issue: N/A — features tested were green. Original bug (only 1 spawn per poll) is fixed: burst_target=min(max_active,4) creates 4 immediately when current spawns are 0 and now>=next_spawn_at. Verified empirically: after POST /spawn/flee, a single GET /spawn/current returns 4 spawns.
